scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) with null Reader throws NullPointerException and releases lock
scenarios.precondition: Parser created via Parser.htmlParser(), Reader input is null
scenarios.expectedResult: NullPointerException is thrown and lock is not held
pseudocode: TEST TC07 parseInput null-Reader throws NPE

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) when TreeBuilder.parse throws Error propagates Error and releases lock
scenarios.precondition: Parser created with stub TreeBuilder that throws OutOfMemoryError in parse
scenarios.expectedResult: OutOfMemoryError is thrown and lock is not held
